scripts.start:now: docker ps -q --filter "name=chest-backup-app-run" | xargs -r docker stop && docker compose build && docker compose run --rm app -- --run-now
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yaml down --remove-orphans && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yaml build test-runner && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yaml run --rm test-runner && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yaml down --remove-orphans
